school_policies.name: First Budget Cap - Community Service
school_policies.description: Community Service clubs can request up to $300 for their first budget

school_policies.name: First Budget Cap - Academic
school_policies.description: Academic clubs can request up to $500 for their first budget

school_policies.name: First Budget Cap - Sports
school_policies.description: Sports clubs can request up to $400 for their first budget

school_policies.name: First Budget Cap - Arts
school_policies.description: Arts clubs can request up to $350 for their first budget

school_policies.name: First Budget Cap - Technology
school_policies.description: Technology clubs can request up to $600 for their first budget

school_policies.name: First Budget Cap - Social
school_policies.description: Social clubs can request up to $200 for their first budget

school_policies.name: Max Clubs Per Advisor
school_policies.description: Faculty advisors can advise at most 3 clubs

school_policies.name: Max Clubs Per Member
school_policies.description: Students can join at most 5 clubs

school_policies.name: Science Dept Budget Reduction
school_policies.description: If the club advisor is from the Science department, the first budget cap is reduced by $100

school_policies.name: New Club Min Members
school_policies.description: New clubs must have at least 2 members before activation
